name: 13q21_LCR_gene_desert
description: 13q21.1-q21.33 gene desert (~25 Mb) interrupted by sparse but high-identity LCRs that participate in evolutionary inversions distinguishing human from chimpanzee lineages. The region contains the DACH1 isoform cluster and harbours recurrent low-frequency CNVs reported in autism cohorts.

architecture.internal_structure: Sparse SD modules (1-20 kb at 92-98% identity) embedded in transposon-rich gene desert; DACH1 isoform-switching hotspot at 71.2-72.0 Mb.
